about.title: About DevFocus
about.desc: DevFocus saves developers time — automatically collecting the best from Hacker News and GitHub daily, with Chinese summaries. No need to check multiple sources, it's all here.
about.hnDesc: The most active tech community worldwide, daily hot topics
about.ghDesc: Daily trending open-source projects, discover new tools and frameworks
about.phDesc: Hottest new products daily, discover the next big thing
about.juejinDesc: Chinese developer community — coding tips and industry news
about.zhihuDesc: Zhihu tech hot list — AI, coding, and hardware picks
